label: Enable full-disk encryption (FileVault / BitLocker / LUKS)
Update OS and apps; reboot before travel
Set a strong device passcode (avoid biometric-only)
description: Most legal regimes can compel a fingerprint/face but not a passphrase.

label: Switch SMS 2FA to a hardware key or authenticator app
Password manager audit; rotate reused/weak passwords
Create travel-only email/accounts; sign out of others
Install and test a reputable VPN before departure
Install Tor Browser; test bridges if VPN/Tor restricted
Full device backup stored at home (not carried)
Minimise data carried; move sensitive files to encrypted backup and remove locally
Decide on a clean/burner device for high-risk borders
Set Signal disappearing messages; enable registration lock
Brief a trusted contact with itinerary + check-in cadence
Agree a duress signal / safe-word with your contact
Run a self-doxxing audit; lock down social privacy
Request CBP/FBI records on yourself (FOIA/Privacy Act) before sensitive travel
Generate fresh PGP/SSH keys for the trip; revoke after
Buy local eSIM in advance (avoid biometric SIM-registration where required)
Carry cash backup separate from cards; know cash-declaration thresholds
Medications in original packaging + Rx; check legality (some OTC drugs are controlled abroad)
Power devices fully OFF before the line (defeats cold-boot / memory extraction)
Confirm full-disk encryption is on
Sign out of cloud apps locally; clear browsers
Hand officers your passport — never unlock your phone unless compelled
Know your rights by status (citizen vs visitor) for this country
Review/clean social handles you may be asked for
Sensitive data in encrypted cloud, removed from device; retrieve after crossing
Understand local decryption-compulsion law before deciding to refuse
UK: Schedule 7 permits 6h detention + device unlock without grounds — assume the worst
US: CBP can demand device unlock at the border (CBP Directive 3340-049A); object in writing
If device is seized, ask for a written receipt; note officer ID + time
Treat public Wi-Fi as hostile; VPN on
Use a USB data-blocker on public charging
Social-media blackout / delay posts (no real-time location)
Keep agreed check-in cadence with your contact
Blend in: neutral dress, no logos, low profile
Hotel room: deadbolt + chain + door wedge; check peephole obstruction
Sweep room for hidden cameras (visible-light + IR scan)
Run a surveillance-detection route before sensitive meetings
Faraday bag for phone when going dark
Strip EXIF before sharing photos — /tools/exif does this locally
Prefer one travel-dedicated card; freeze others remotely
Don't leave hotel receipts, boarding passes, baggage tags in trash — shred or burn
Rotate credentials used while traveling
Review active login sessions on key accounts; revoke unknown ones
Re-image / factory-reset any burner device
Check accounts against Have I Been Pwned
Debrief incidents into the incident log
Revoke trip-only PGP/SSH keys
FOIA after-action: request border-search records for the crossing
